| | We set an ambitious goal this month. 2,500 donations. We wanted to show we had momentum going into the most consequential year of elections this century. **And we did it! In fact, we CRUSHED our goal - we reached our goal by 110%. Everyone on Team Kennedy stepped up. Something special is happening here. ** The hard-earned dollars that were donated to our campaign are already going to good use. We just hired new organizers to make sure we have the capacity to knock on doors (yes, even in the Massachusetts winter), make phone calls, and recruit new volunteers. Not only that, but we just finished two town halls today - completely in Spanish. Something that hasn't been done in Massachusetts Senate race history. How was that made possible? Because of the contributions made to these emails. These emails are the driving force behind this campaign. And just as Joe would say, we're grateful. This year is going to be crazy. It's going to be hard. And we'll need to fight. | Michael isn't running a typical campaign.

He's not racing to the left or right talking points, he isn't dumping money into Facebook, and he doesn't play into the media circus. Michael's not focused on all of that: [his focus is talking to people just like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab2b/134673f2/37ab4daa/69972cf1/1263884260/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael's spent more time in New Hampshire than any other candidate in the race. He's been to living rooms, diners, and town halls building a broad coalition. He stays at every event until every single question is answered.

[No one else is as committed to solving the problems that keep every family up all night. That's why we need your help to ensure Michael shows up strong as voting gets underway - it's now or never >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab2b/134673f2/37ab4daa/69972cf1/1263884260/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Dear Friend, Thank you all for the big push at the end of January! Truth is - we didn't quite make it. We fell a couple of hundred dollars short. But that's ok. As a high school and college swimmer so many years ago, I learned that if you achieve every goal you set, the goals you're setting are too easy. Now the good news - we're one month shy of Super Tuesday and we've got great momentum. We've already raised almost 90% of what we raised __the entire 2018 cycle__. And we're investing in the team and the organization we need to take this seat in November. But we still have a primary ahead of us, and we can't take anything for granted. Our all-out phone banking and texting campaign starts tomorrow. We'll get another mail piece out and there are plenty of forums and events on the calendar. [Check out the KBTX/KWTX forum here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14560885/152771502/-1857862373?t=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlhOGNkNS1jZjQ1LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oswdGhdXN9Xb2jOg2JO-FEKzu7L7o5LrbuRUrX6RnkM=&emci=08114331-c745-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=079a8cd5-cf45-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10438639) if you want to see how the candidates compare side by side. Early voting starts in just 16 days. Primary day is just 30 days away. name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: a note from the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390344/55b66746/220ebdb8/80ff64e/2777507194/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Wanted to send a quick note this morning. It's been a busy few weeks. We just finished the last two town halls of our January tour yesterday. 13 in total. Last night, I finally got a good 6 hours of sleep. And got to spend some time with Ellie, James, and Lauren. I needed the recharge. I'll be honest, the long days, early mornings, and time away from home -- from my kids, from my wife -- it's tough sometimes. **But there is something about the campaign trail that keeps you going: The people you get to meet. People who completely inspire you. Who remind you why this work matters. Who become a part of your story -- and if you're lucky, you become a small part of theirs.** It's the folks who came out to my town hall in Worcester, on a freezing morning just a few days into the new year, when I didn't know what to expect during my first town hall of the campaign. It's the community that came together at our Boston office opening, in the heart of Roxbury. A community that far too often gets skipped over. It's the cities and towns in Western Mass, who came out for an hour and a half on a sunny Sunday to listen to some red-haired guy with some ideas on how to fix things, to do things a little differently. It's the energy (and yes, the salsa music) in the room during our Spanish-only town halls. Being part of something that has never been done in Massachusetts Senate history. It's people like Lizzie who I first met when I ran for Congress in 2012, when she was maybe four or five years old. And she came to see me again in Framingham just a few weeks ago, eight years later. When I saw her in the front row I put the whole event on pause for a few minutes so I could say hello. And she was just like I remembered her -- dynamic, sweet, full of light. It's the young veterans I sat around a table with to hear about what they sacrificed for our country and to let them know that because they fought so hard for us, we're going to fight for them. And I mean it. **All of this is to say, this job, this race, this campaign - it's worth it.** It's worth it because of the people on the trail and people like you, who read these emails. Your words of encouragement and your stories - they matter. We just finished the first month of the year. Our primary is on September 1st. I don't plan on slowing down any time soon. I can promise you that I will put every fiber of my being into this race because it matters. Massachusetts matters. This country matters. People matter. I'm all in, and I hope you are too. --Joe [Contribute](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390344/55b66746/220ebdb8/80ff64f/2777507194/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-02-busyjanuary&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") |
---|---|---

name: Gary Peters
subject: what is most important to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
With the election right around the corner, I really want to hear what's on your mind.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9d2/5721a3ed/70e0f2a2/efb7761/1396943315/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

There's one thing that motivates me above anything else in the Senate - and that's getting things done for the people of Michigan. Often times, that means passing legislation to make a real difference in people's lives. Other times, it means demanding the truth and protecting our democratic institutions.
So when it comes to what's happening in Washington right now, I'm determined to fight for accountability, honesty and transparency. Americans deserve that from their government.
Trust me, I know everything that's going on right now can feel chaotic. That's why I think it's important to take a step back and check in with you. Especially at this time, I want to know what issues are most important to you.
**So I've put together this new survey to get your feedback. With the election right around the corner, I really want to hear what's on your mind. [Can you take just a moment to submit your feedback? You can use this link: https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priorities](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priority-Dec-Survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk277-su-in-nd")**
I appreciate you taking the time.

Gary

name: Aleida Garcia
subject: Why I support Mike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
| Dear Friend - My name is Aleida Garcia - I am a mother, activist, and fighter against the gun violence epidemic in Philadelphia. Gun violence has become a common occurrence in our country, bombarding our daily lives with anguishing news of yet another horrible and needless death. My only son Alejandro Rojas Garcia was murdered on January 24, 2015. His life was stolen and our lives destroyed by one criminal with a gun. The tool that facilitated Alex’s death was an illegal semiautomatic weapon that was shot 15 times into his car and his body. Without that gun, the killer would not have been able to steal my son’s life. This tragedy was — and continues to be — a nightmare for our family. There is one thing that families of murder victims all agree on: our loved ones won't come back, but there is still time to save the lives of so many others. Right now, there is a presidential candidate who has acted in real ways to end the gun violence epidemic.[ Mike Bloomberg has a record of creating effective, common sense solutions and initiating change](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14576121/152937309/-663326446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzQvMS84MDA1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjNkMGNlNy0xYTQ2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lOW9D1f6MZLjjYm0psP2WekhVmkZC9Sn_ZTX9vcR48=&emci=a754aa8b-d941-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=423d0ce7-1a46-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=54478). He co-founded Everytown for Gun Safety and Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America. We have a real chance to reverse the tide of violence by choosing the strong and caring leadership of Mike Bloomberg — I hope you’ll join me in voting for him on April 28th. \-- ** Aleida Garcia, M.Ed. Mother of Alejandro Rojas Garcia
Co-Founder of the National Homicide Justice Alliance. Inc.**

body:

Team -

I'm proud to say California has made serious progress fighting climate change during my term as governor.
Unfortunately, at every turn, the Trump administration has attempted to block that progress. They have gutted environmental protections and denied climate science - all to line the pockets of Big Oil.
In one of his latest attacks on the planet, Trump rolled back federal greenhouse gas standards - and even revoked CA's authority to regulate auto emissions. If the president thinks he can stop the states from taking action on climate change, he is dead wrong.

body:
| | Over 156,000 emails sent to FOX Sports executives

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSHgJJQzDUrGw4Kg8BkQIn-rcLo5WfVowshPIdFba5wuxHpS6F58M9jKPdosgLpBSA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=1)
| Peter, Wow! In merely a matter of days, you sent over 156,000 emails to FOX Sports executives letting them know that the censorship of the voices of survivors of abortion is unethical and unacceptable! Thank you for your incredible outpouring of support to get the [Faces of Choice](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Z_eKYISIS7sd66hLRbFeqnuGguK0a4y1wkoDKZxByio&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=2) ad played during the Super Bowl. While we were hopeful that FOX Sports would still give approval, even just hours before the Super Bowl, we never received a direct response from FOX Sports. Their silence is deafening and shameful. However, the response from all of you gained overwhelming momentum in spreading the message of abortion survivors throughout the media. Articles were published on a number of major news sites and a host of influencers voiced their support of the campaign on social media. While the Faces of Choice ad will not play during this year’s Super Bowl, we have a few simple things you can do to continue to spread a pro-life message.

**You can help in the following ways:**
1. ******If you have****not signed the petition, you can still do so**[HERE](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=j7HNdFFdmHSh8w7VvhTEBpE0vuVQE_BQTeRbVgKjRSw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=3)**.****We will be letting FOX Sports know about your overwhelming response regarding their decision to reject the Faces of Choice ad.**
2. ******Shut off your televisions** during the Super Bowl's commercial breaks; go instead to the Faces of Choice [YouTube channel](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSv4jIoFYnav8GsNZkXIFt3m_bLtYpWr-Pm4gVj-LCgDA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=4), and watch and share the stories of amazing survivors of abortion.
3. ******F****ollow My Faith Votes on social media to stay up to date on this story and others like it.** Like, follow, and subscribe to My Faith Votes on [Facebook](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-xeQ5IQpYwr_xHikzyshIQw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=5), [YouTube](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWTznPBX4qQCyIuEKVwqIjf_hYrdNIwZOVvRlbPJC8ZAqw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=6), [Instagram](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHWLss5aJ9eK9bzy1llzuda3&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=7), and [Twitter](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TryYfveu9IfIKW5HpZvWBlLMOLgVi-6PR9SKs8pbZj1k&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=8).
4. ******Utilize our tools to learn of the many ways you can take action to stand for the sanctity of life**[here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSHgJJQzDUrGw4Kg8BkQIn-rcLo5WfVowshPIdFba5wuxHpS6F58M9jKPdosgLpBSA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200202com01&n=9)**.**

name: NH for Yang
subject: We need you in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
The NH primary is on February 11, can you come volunteer?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6842%2E377263%2ERUdSTl) Yang Gang --

After shocking the world in Iowa on Monday night, Andrew Yang will land in New Hampshire on Tuesday morning ready to continue our momentum by speaking with thousands of Granite State voters. We will be poised to break out as the candidate to beat.

However, we’ve looked at the numbers, and if we don’t have more volunteers on the ground, we’ll miss our opportunity to prove to the country that Andrew Yang is the only candidate who can beat Trump and make our economy work for each of us.

[To make our operation a success, we need at least 43 more out-of-state volunteers like you to come to New Hampshire to knock on doors and share why they support Andrew Yang. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-nh-volunteers-20200202?source=email-20200202-nh-volunteers&t=6&akid=6842%2E377263%2ERUdSTl)

This week in New Hampshire is especially valuable. The data shows that 50 percent of New Hampshire voters decide who they will vote for in the seven days between the Iowa caucus and New Hampshire primary. **That’s why we need your help on the ground.**

[If you’re ready to help New Hampshire reach voters, sign up now to join our nationally recognized out-of-state volunteer team.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-nh-volunteers-20200202?source=email-20200202-nh-volunteers&t=7&akid=6842%2E377263%2ERUdSTl)

Being an out-of-state volunteer is much simpler than what many may think. Once you sign up, an organizer on our team will call you to help answer common questions about what it means to volunteer, how to get there, and where to stay. After that, they’ll plug you into the Yang Gang and the rest is history!

With your support and help on the ground, we can make universal basic income possible in the United States.

Team Yang | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24318?t=2&akid=6842%2E377263%2ERUdSTl)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=6842%2E377263%2ERUdSTl) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6842%2E377263%2ERUdSTl) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

subject: Money is not speech. Period.

body:

| | **It's been ten years since the Supreme Court decided that it's perfectly okay for unlimited, anonymous money to be spent in our elections.** You know the name:_Citizens United._ **[It's time to take back power for the people in our democracy: Sign the petition to support a constitutional amendment overturning Citizens United!](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fb75/6cd27893/533fd50a/15863a89/2921702398/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2020-01-overturncitizensunited-email%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26noskip%3Dtrue%26recurring%3D1")** With the 2020 elections coming up quickly, this is so very critical. SuperPACs and the ultra-wealthy are going to be spending lavishly to prop up their unpopular candidates and causes--hoping to confuse and misinform voters, buy unparalleled influence, keep the Senate, and save Donald Trump's failing presidency. It's time to overturn _Citizens United_ and to rally a grassroots movement to get it done. **[Add your voice now: Sign the petition to support a constitutional amendment overturning _Citizens United_!](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fb75/6cd27893/533fd50a/15863a89/2921702398/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2020-01-overturncitizensunited-email%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26noskip%3Dtrue%26recurring%3D1")** **_Jeff_** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fb75/6cd27893/533fd50a/15863a89/2921702398/VEsC/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2020-01-overturncitizensunited-email%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26noskip%3Dtrue%26recurring%3D1") |

body:
Give me a call TODAY if you plan to caucus TOMORROW and want to help lead our campaign to victory!

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489

Great time traveling the state to see Vice President Pence in Sioux City and President Trump in Des Moines! Remember to go to caucus TOMORROW, find your caucus location here (http://iowaGOP.org/2020-caucus-locations?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489) , and let me know if you plan on running for delegate.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489
Hello

Caucuses are finally here! You might think that there's no reason to show up tomorrow but this election is as important as ever. You play a part in creating the party platform and, if you run for delegate, decide who is nominated in each primary race: including this one!

Let me know if you are going to caucus or want to be a delegate by clicking the button below ⬇️ (https://emojipedia.org/downwards-black-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489)
DELEGATE SIGNUP (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 120 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK

Very busy week ramping up to the caucuses visiting with Iowans all across this district. 'Twas a very merry time with ABATE D19 (https://www.facebook.com/groups/ABATEofIA19/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489) in Auburn at their annual Christmas party and appreciated the warm welcome from the Crawford County GOP Women (https://www.facebook.com/CrawfordIAWomen/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489) in Denison. Circled back with friends and many supporters at the Firemen's Steak Fry in Schleswig and Kossuth County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Kossuth-County-Republicans-635696166482379/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489) in Algona. Wrapped it all up with a fun and educational Lunch N' Learn about the caucuses in Sioux City.

Honored to welcome Vice President Pence and President Trump to Iowa on Thursday. Should be BIG turnout on Monday night to re-elect this ticket and keep America great.

UP NEXT

Be sure to make tomorrow's caucuses at 7 PM. You will be the first Americans to cast your vote for president. Looking forward to some great upcoming meetings with conservative youth organizations and other passionate supporters across the state.

STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489

* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=9f843f56a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-9f843f56a6-25822489)
